## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Transport / registry integration
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] `make lint` passes (zero ruff errors)
- [ ] New tools added to `_BASE_TOOL_NAMES` if base-level
- [ ] New tools documented in `docs/tools.md`
- [ ] Tests cover happy path + at least one error case
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
